test-case.name: AutoAdvance_DisabledMidScene_StopsBeforeNextScene
test-case.output: DialogueSystem: Starting scene Cancellable Auto Scene DialogueSystem: Displaying line line_001 DialogueSystem: Dialogue stopped

test-case.name: AutoAdvance_MultipleLines_TransitionsAfterLastLine
test-case.output: DialogueSystem: Starting scene Multi-line Auto Scene DialogueSystem: Displaying line line_001 DialogueSystem: Displaying line line_002 DialogueSystem: Dialogue complete - checking for nextScene DialogueSystem: Current scene = Multi-line Auto Scene DialogueSystem: NextScene field = SET DialogueSystem: NextScene.RuntimeKeyIsValid() = False DialogueSystem: ✓ nextScene is set, attempting to load... DialogueSystem: ✓ Successfully loaded next scene: Next Scene DialogueSystem: Firing OnSceneNavigationRequested event...

test-case.name: AutoAdvance_WithNextScene_TransitionsAutomatically
test-case.output: DialogueSystem: Starting scene Auto Scene DialogueSystem: Displaying line line_001 DialogueSystem: Dialogue complete - checking for nextScene DialogueSystem: Current scene = Auto Scene DialogueSystem: NextScene field = SET DialogueSystem: NextScene.RuntimeKeyIsValid() = False DialogueSystem: ✓ nextScene is set, attempting to load... DialogueSystem: ✓ Successfully loaded next scene: Next Scene DialogueSystem: Firing OnSceneNavigationRequested event...

test-case.name: AutoAdvance_WithoutNextScene_CompletesDialogue
test-case.output: DialogueSystem: Starting scene Auto Scene DialogueSystem: Displaying line line_001 DialogueSystem: Dialogue complete - checking for nextScene DialogueSystem: Current scene = Auto Scene DialogueSystem: NextScene field = NULL DialogueSystem: No next scene defined (or invalid), dialogue ending normally

test-case.name: NextScene_WhenDialogueCompletes_FiresNavigationEvent
test-case.output: DialogueSystem: Starting scene Current Scene DialogueSystem: Displaying line line_001 DialogueSystem: Dialogue complete - checking for nextScene DialogueSystem: Current scene = Current Scene DialogueSystem: NextScene field = SET DialogueSystem: NextScene.RuntimeKeyIsValid() = False DialogueSystem: ✓ nextScene is set, attempting to load... DialogueSystem: ✓ Successfully loaded next scene: Next Scene DialogueSystem: Firing OnSceneNavigationRequested event...

test-case.name: NextScene_WhenLoadFails_CompletesDialogueGracefully
test-case.output: DialogueSystem: Starting scene Current Scene DialogueSystem: Displaying line line_001 DialogueSystem: Dialogue complete - checking for nextScene DialogueSystem: Current scene = Current Scene DialogueSystem: NextScene field = SET DialogueSystem: NextScene.RuntimeKeyIsValid() = False DialogueSystem: ✓ nextScene is set, attempting to load... DialogueSystem: ✗ Failed to load next scene (returned null)

test-case.name: NextScene_WhenNoNextScene_CompletesWithoutNavigation
test-case.output: DialogueSystem: Starting scene Final Scene DialogueSystem: Displaying line line_001 DialogueSystem: Dialogue complete - checking for nextScene DialogueSystem: Current scene = Final Scene DialogueSystem: NextScene field = NULL DialogueSystem: No next scene defined (or invalid), dialogue ending normally
